Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ThroughputCaseRow

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ThroughputCaseRow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ThroughputCaseRow extends Object implements Serializable
One evaluated case in a process-model throughput-to-bottleneck study.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ThroughputCaseRow

      public ThroughputCaseRow(int caseNumber, double throughputMultiplier, Map<String,Double> producerMultipliers, double objectiveValue, boolean feasible, boolean simulationConverged, String activeArea, String activeEquipment, String activeConstraint, double utilization, double currentValue, double designValue, double capacityMargin, double utilizationMargin, String unit, String errorMessage, long evaluationTimeMs)
      Creates a throughput case row.
      Parameters:
      caseNumber - case sequence number
      throughputMultiplier - scalar throughput multiplier
      producerMultipliers - producer multipliers used in the case
      objectiveValue - raw objective value
      feasible - true when all hard constraints are satisfied
      simulationConverged - true when the model converged
      activeArea - active bottleneck area name
      activeEquipment - active bottleneck equipment name
      activeConstraint - active bottleneck constraint name
      utilization - active bottleneck utilization
      currentValue - current bottleneck load
      designValue - bottleneck design value
      capacityMargin - remaining capacity in engineering units
      utilizationMargin - remaining utilization margin
      unit - bottleneck unit
      errorMessage - error message if the case failed
      evaluationTimeMs - evaluation wall-clock time in milliseconds

  • Method Details

    • fromEvaluation

      public static ThroughputCaseRow fromEvaluation(int caseNumber, double throughputMultiplier, Map<String,Double> producerMultipliers, ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.EvaluationResult evaluation)
      Creates a row from a process-model evaluator result.
      Parameters:
      caseNumber - case sequence number
      throughputMultiplier - scalar throughput multiplier
      producerMultipliers - producer multipliers used in the case
      evaluation - evaluation result
      Returns:
      populated throughput case row

      public int getCaseNumber()
      Gets the case number.
      Returns:
      case number

      Returns:

      Gets the raw objective value.

    • isFeasible

      Checks feasibility.
      Returns:
      true when the case is feasible

    • isSimulationConverged

      public boolean isSimulationConverged()
      Checks simulation convergence.
      Returns:
      true when the simulation converged

      Gets bottleneck utilization.

      Gets bottleneck design value.

      bottleneck design value

      Gets remaining capacity.

      Gets remaining utilization margin.
      Returns:
      remaining utilization margin

    • getUnit

      public String getUnit()
      Gets bottleneck unit.
      Returns:
      bottleneck unit

    • getErrorMessage

      public String getErrorMessage()
      Gets error message.
      Returns:
      error message, or null when no error occurred

      Gets evaluation time.
      Returns:
      evaluation time in milliseconds
